name: end-to-end: drafting then review-queue completes the ADR-0009 six-stage pipeline to a queue decision
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-e2e --tool checkov --prose 'Security groups must not allow unrestricted ingress (0.0.0.0/0).' --json > d.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/review-queue.sh" --in d.json 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'rule=g-e2e .* queue=(auto-stage|coverage-review)' e.txt && echo pipeline-complete 1>&2
